'''Gallisport''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Shesharile 5]], a large [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Shesharile system/Legends|Shesharile system]]. It was a crowded, run-down city, filled with huge industrial installations.
Both [[Dutan Mining Supply Exports]] and the local government-employed [[Legally Authorized Law Authorities]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]] were headquartered at Gallisport.
